title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump And His America Are Fast Losing Touch With Reality
summary_full: What is the guiding logic of the rather brash turn in American foreign policy? It is all too easy to box Trump as an irrational player, but frankly, it is a bit of an analytical copout.
